01

Areas of Expertise

🔗
Program Delivery & Portfolio Governance
I own complex, multi-team programs from ambiguous brief to shipped outcome. My discipline spans dependency mapping, risk-adjusted roadmaps, OKR-aligned quarterly planning, and executive-level governance, the kind that actually surfaces blockers early rather than reporting them post-mortem. I've delivered $4M+ programs across SaaS, ERP, cloud, and identity platforms, consistently hitting 90%+ on-time across 6 global regions simultaneously.
OKR GovernanceDependency MappingRisk ManagementExecutive ReportingSAFe · Agile
🏗
Engineering Leadership & Org Scaling
I build engineering organisations that scale with intentionality, not just headcount. From growing a team of 4 to 27 across APAC and EMEA, to establishing operating models, career frameworks, and hiring pipelines that make each new engineer a force multiplier. I lead with clarity, ownership, and growth pathways, maintaining 0% attrition through periods of intense delivery pressure.
Org DesignHiring & RetentionCareer FrameworksDistributed TeamsDORA Metrics
☁️
Platform Modernisation & Cloud Engineering
I've led cloud-first platform transformations across AWS, Salesforce CRM, ERP integrations, REST API ecosystems, and IAM/identity platforms. My approach ties platform investment directly to business outcomes, reduced infrastructure costs, modular microservices, CI/CD pipelines, and SLO governance frameworks that cut P0/P1 incidents by 40% and improved deployment frequency across the board.
AWSSalesforceCI/CD · DevOpsMicroservicesSLO / SLA Governance
🤖
AI & GenAI Delivery
I've moved AI from boardroom conversation to production reality. Piloting AWS Bedrock (Claude, Titan) for traveller insights and operational analytics, and Salesforce Agentforce for lifecycle automation, not as POCs, but as shipped initiatives that eliminated 60% of manual effort. I understand how to structure GenAI delivery: the governance, the data readiness, the failure modes, and what actually drives ROI versus what's just hype.
AWS BedrockSalesforce AgentforceGenAI GovernanceWorkflow AutomationAI ROI
